## Entry 386
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:25:16.680Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:25:16.680Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"mkdir -p client/src/{components/{chat,input,layout},hooks,lib,pages,theme,types} client/src/test && cat > client/src/types/chat.ts <<'EOF'\\nexport type AgentStatus = \\\"online\\\" | \\\"connecting\\\" | \\\"degraded\\\";\\n\\nexport interface RiskMetric {\\n  probability?: number;\\n  severity?: \\\"CRITICAL\\\" | \\\"HIGH\\\" | \\\"MODERATE\\\" | \\\"LOW\\\";\\n  congestion_score?: number;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface HealthAdvisory {\\n  aqi?: number;\\n  aqi_category?: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface EmergencyReadiness {\\n  recommendation: string;\\n  actions?: string[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface RiskCardPayload {\\n  neighborhood: string;\\n  generated_at: string;\\n  overall_risk_score: number;\\n  flood_risk?: RiskMetric;\\n  power_outage_risk?: RiskMetric;\\n  traffic_delay_index?: RiskMetric;\\n  health_advisory?: HealthAdvisory;\\n  emergency_readiness?: EmergencyReadiness;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ArtifactPayload {\\n  type: \\\"html\\\";\\n  title: string;\\n  source: string;\\n  description?: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ChatResponse {\\n  message: string;\\n  risk_card?: RiskCardPayload | null;\\n  artifact?: ArtifactPayload | null;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ChatRequest {\\n  session_id: string;\\n  message: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface HealthResponse {\\n  backend: \\\"ok\\\" | \\\"down\\\";\\n  agent: \\\"ok\\\" | \\\"down\\\";\\n  status: AgentStatus;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface AppError {\\n  code: string;\\n  message: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface Message {\\n  id: string;\\n  role: \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\";\\n  content: string;\\n  timestamp: Date;\\n  riskCard?: RiskCardPayload;\\n  artifact?: ArtifactPayload;\\n  isError?: boolean;\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/lib/api.ts <<'EOF'\\nimport axios from \\\"axios\\\";\\nimport type { ChatRequest, ChatResponse, HealthResponse } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\nconst api = axios.create({\\n  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/\\\",\\n});\\n\\nexport async function postChat(payload: ChatRequest): Promise<ChatResponse> {\\n  const response = await api.post<ChatResponse>(\\\"/api/chat\\\", payload);\\n  return response.data;\\n}\\n\\nexport async function getHealth(): Promise<HealthResponse> {\\n  const response = await api.get<HealthResponse>(\\\"/api/health\\\");\\n  return response.data;\\n}\\n\\nexport default api;\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts <<'EOF'\\nimport DOMPurify from \\\"dompurify\\\";\\n\\nconst EXTERNAL_URL_PATTERN = /^(https?:)?\\\\/\\\\//i;\\n\\nexport function sanitizeArtifactHtml(source: string): string {\\n  const cleaned = DOMPurify.sanitize(source, {\\n    USE_PROFILES: { html: true, svg: true, svgFilters: true },\\n    FORBID_TAGS: [\\\"script\\\", \\\"iframe\\\", \\\"object\\\", \\\"embed\\\", \\\"link\\\"],\\n    FORBID_ATTR: [\\\"onerror\\\", \\\"onload\\\", \\\"onclick\\\", \\\"onmouseover\\\", \\\"onfocus\\\"],\\n  });\\n\\n  const parser = new DOMParser();\\n  const doc = parser.parseFromString(cleaned, \\\"text/html\\\");\\n\\n  for (const node of doc.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement | SVGElement>(\\\"*\\\")) {\\n    for (const attr of [\\\"href\\\", \\\"src\\\", \\\"xlink:href\\\"]) {\\n      const value = node.getAttribute(attr);\\n      if (!value) {\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n      if (EXTERNAL_URL_PATTERN.test(value) || value.startsWith(\\\"data:\\\") || value.startsWith(\\\"//\\\")) {\\n        node.removeAttribute(attr);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return doc.body.innerHTML.trim();\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildArtifactSrcDoc(content: string, title: string): string {\\n  return `<!DOCTYPE html>\\n<html lang=\\\"en\\\">\\n  <head>\\n    <meta charset=\\\"utf-8\\\" />\\n    <meta name=\\\"viewport\\\" content=\\\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\\\" />\\n    <title>${title}</title>\\n    <style>\\n      body {\\n        margin: 0;\\n        padding: 16px;\\n        font-family: \\\"IBM Plex Sans\\\", sans-serif;\\n        color: #0f1f2e;\\n        background: #ffffff;\\n      }\\n      table {\\n        width: 100%;\\n        border-collapse: collapse;\\n      }\\n      th, td {\\n        border: 1px solid #d1dbe8;\\n        padding: 8px;\\n        text-align: left;\\n      }\\n      svg {\\n        max-width: 100%;\\n        height: auto;\\n      }\\n    </style>\\n  </head>\\n  <body>${content}</body>\\n</html>`;\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/theme/metrosense.ts <<'EOF'\\nimport { createTheme } from \\\"@mui/material/styles\\\";\\n\\nconst metrosenseTheme = createTheme({\\n  palette: {\\n    mode: \\\"light\\\",\\n    background: {\\n      default: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\",\\n      paper: \\\"#FFFFFF\\\",\\n    },\\n    primary: {\\n      main: \\\"#005F8E\\\",\\n      contrastText: \\\"#FFFFFF\\\",\\n    },\\n    error: { main: \\\"#C0213A\\\" },\\n    warning: { main: \\\"#B07D0A\\\" },\\n    success: { main: \\\"#16863E\\\" },\\n    text: {\\n      primary: \\\"#0F1F2E\\\",\\n      secondary: \\\"#4A5568\\\",\\n      disabled: \\\"#6B7B8D\\\",\\n    },\\n  },\\n  shape: { borderRadius: 12 },\\n  typography: {\\n    fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Sans\\\", sans-serif',\\n    fontSize: 14,\\n  },\\n  components: {\\n    MuiCssBaseline: {\\n      styleOverrides: {\\n        body: {\\n          backgroundImage:\\n            \\\"radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(0,95,142,0.08), transparent 30%), linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f9fc 0%, #eef3f8 100%)\\\",\\n        },\\n      },\\n    },\\n    MuiButtonBase: {\\n      styleOverrides: {\\n        root: {\\n          \\\"&:focus-visible\\\": {\\n            outline: \\\"2px solid #005F8E\\\",\\n            outlineOffset: \\\"2px\\\",\\n          },\\n        },\\n      },\\n    },\\n  },\\n});\\n\\nexport default metrosenseTheme;\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/hooks/useChat.ts <<'EOF'\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport { AxiosError } from \\\"axios\\\";\\nimport { getHealth, postChat } from \\\"@/lib/api\\\";\\nimport type { AgentStatus, AppError, ArtifactPayload, Message, RiskCardPayload } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\nconst HEALTH_POLL_MS = 30_000;\\nconst PROMPTS = [\\n  \\\"If it rains 60mm tonight, which underpasses should be barricaded?\\\",\\n  \\\"How does current humidity compare to pre-monsoon averages of the last decade?\\\",\\n  \\\"Which logistics routes through Bengaluru are highest risk today?\\\",\\n  \\\"Generate a risk scorecard for Sarjapur Road.\\\",\\n];\\n\\nfunction createSessionId(): string {\\n  if (typeof crypto !== \\\"undefined\\\" && \\\"randomUUID\\\" in crypto) {\\n    return crypto.randomUUID();\\n  }\\n  return `session-${Date.now()}`;\\n}\\n\\nfunction createMessage(partial: Omit<Message, \\\"id\\\" | \\\"timestamp\\\">): Message {\\n  return {\\n    id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`,\\n    timestamp: new Date(),\\n    ...partial,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\nfunction extractError(error: unknown): AppError {\\n  if (error instanceof AxiosError) {\\n    const payload = error.response?.data as { error?: AppError } | undefined;\\n    if (payload?.error) {\\n      return payload.error;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return {\\n    code: \\\"UNKNOWN_ERROR\\\",\\n    message: \\\"Something went wrong while contacting MetroSense.\\\",\\n  };\\n}\\n\\nexport interface UseChatResult {\\n  agentStatus: AgentStatus;\\n  error: AppError | null;\\n  input: string;\\n  isSending: boolean;\\n  messages: Message[];\\n  prompts: string[];\\n  sessionId: string;\\n  setInput: (value: string) => void;\\n  sendMessage: (value?: string) => Promise<void>;\\n}\\n\\nexport function useChat(): UseChatResult {\\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);\\n  const [input, setInput] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [isSending, setIsSending] = useState(false);\\n  const [agentStatus, setAgentStatus] = useState<AgentStatus>(\\\"connecting\\\");\\n  const [error, setError] = useState<AppError | null>(null);\\n  const sessionIdRef = useRef<string>(createSessionId());\\n\\n  const refreshHealth = useCallback(async () => {\\n    try {\\n      const response = await getHealth();\\n      setAgentStatus(response.status);\\n    } catch {\\n      setAgentStatus(\\\"degraded\\\");\\n    }\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    void refreshHealth();\\n    const interval = window.setInterval(() => {\\n      void refreshHealth();\\n    }, HEALTH_POLL_MS);\\n    return () => window.clearInterval(interval);\\n  }, [refreshHealth]);\\n\\n  const sendMessage = useCallback(\\n    async (value?: string) => {\\n      const messageText = (value ?? input).trim();\\n      if (!messageText || isSending) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      setError(null);\\n      setIsSending(true);\\n      setMessages((current) => [\\n        ...current,\\n        createMessage({ role: \\\"user\\\", content: messageText }),\\n      ]);\\n      setInput(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n      try {\\n        const response = await postChat({\\n          session_id: sessionIdRef.current,\\n          message: messageText,\\n        });\\n\\n        const assistantMessage = createMessage({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: response.message,\\n          riskCard: response.risk_card ?? undefined,\\n          artifact: response.artifact ?? undefined,\\n        });\\n\\n        setMessages((current) => [...current, assistantMessage]);\\n      } catch (caughtError) {\\n        const appError = extractError(caughtError);\\n        setError(appError);\\n        setMessages((current) => [\\n          ...current,\\n          createMessage({\\n            role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n            content: appError.message,\\n            isError: true,\\n          }),\\n        ]);\\n      } finally {\\n        setIsSending(false);\\n        void refreshHealth();\\n      }\\n    },\\n    [input, isSending, refreshHealth],\\n  );\\n\\n  return useMemo(\\n    () => ({\\n      agentStatus,\\n      error,\\n      input,\\n      isSending,\\n      messages,\\n      prompts: PROMPTS,\\n      sessionId: sessionIdRef.current,\\n      setInput,\\n      sendMessage,\\n    }),\\n    [agentStatus, error, input, isSending, messages, sendMessage],\\n  );\\n}\\n\\nexport type { ArtifactPayload, RiskCardPayload };\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/layout/Header.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { useMemo } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport CheckCircleOutlineRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/CheckCircleOutlineRounded\\\";\\nimport ErrorOutlineRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/ErrorOutlineRounded\\\";\\nimport SyncRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/SyncRounded\\\";\\nimport { Box, ButtonBase, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport type { AgentStatus } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface HeaderProps {\\n  agentStatus: AgentStatus;\\n  sessionId: string;\\n}\\n\\nconst STATUS_CONFIG: Record<AgentStatus, { bg: string; border: string; color: string; label: string }> = {\\n  online: {\\n    bg: \\\"#F0FDF4\\\",\\n    border: \\\"#16A34A\\\",\\n    color: \\\"#14532D\\\",\\n    label: \\\"Agent Online\\\",\\n  },\\n  connecting: {\\n    bg: \\\"#FFF9EB\\\",\\n    border: \\\"#CA8A04\\\",\\n    color: \\\"#6B4C00\\\",\\n    label: \\\"Connecting...\\\",\\n  },\\n  degraded: {\\n    bg: \\\"#FFF0F2\\\",\\n    border: \\\"#DC2626\\\",\\n    color: \\\"#9B1D2A\\\",\\n    label: \\\"Degraded\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\nfunction StatusIcon({ status }: { status: AgentStatus }) {\\n  if fontSize=\\\"small\\\" />;\\n  }\\n  return <SyncRoundedIcon fontSize=\\\"small\\\" className=\\\"spin\\\" />;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function Header({ agentStatus, sessionId }: HeaderProps) {\\n  const statusConfig = STATUS_CONFIG[agentStatus];\\n  const compactSession = useMemo(() => sessionId.slice(0, 8), [sessionId]);\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Box\\n      component=\\\"header\\\"\\n      sx={{\\n        position: \\\"sticky\\\",\\n        top: 0,\\n        zIndex: 10,\\n        borderBottom: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n        backgroundColor: \\\"rgba(255,255,255,0.92)\\\",\\n        backdropFilter: \\\"blur(12px)\\\",\\n        boxShadow: \\\"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\\\",\\n      }}\\n    >\\n      <Stack\\n        direction={{ xs: \\\"column\\\", md: \\\"row\\\" }}\\n <Box>\\n          <Typography variant=\\\"h5\\\" fontWeight={700} letterSpacing=\\\"0.08em\\\">\\n            METROSENSE\\n          </Typography>\\n          <Typography\\n            sx={{\\n              color: \\\"text.secondary\\\",\\n              fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace',\\n              fontSize: 11,\\n              letterSpacing: \\\"0.12em\\\",\\n            }}\\n borderLeft: `4px solid ${statusConfig.border}`,\\n              borderRadius: 2,\\n              backgroundColor: statusConfig.bg,\\n              color: statusConfig.color,\\n              px: 1.5,\\n              py: 1,\\n            }}\\n          >\\n            <StatusIcon status={agentStatus} />\\n            <Typography fontWeight={600}>{statusConfig.label}</Typography>\\n          </Stack>\\n\\n          <ButtonBase\\n            aria-label=\\\"Copy session ID\\\"\\n            onClick={() => navigator.clipboard?.writeText(sessionId)}\\n            sx={{\\n              borderRadius: 2,\\n              border: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n              px: 1.5,\\n              py: 1,\\n              justifyContent: \\\"flex-start\\\",\\n            }}\\n          >\\n            <Typography\\n              sx={{\\n                color: \\\"text.secondary\\\",\\n                fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace',\\n                fontSize: 11,\\n                letterSpacing: \\\"0.08em\\\",\\n              }}\\n            >\\n              SESSION · {compactSession}\\n            </Typography>\\n          </ButtonBase>\\n        </Stack>\\n aria-live=\\\"polite\\\"\\n      aria-label=\\\"Agent is analyzing sensor data\\\"\\n      sx={{ color: \\\"text.secondary\\\", px: 1, py: 1 }}\\n    >\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\"  \\\"@keyframes pulse\\\": {\\n                \\\"0%, 80%, 100%\\\": { opacity: 0.25, transform: \\\"scale(0.8)\\\" },\\n                \\\"40%\\\": { opacity: 1, transform: \\\"scale(1)\\\" },\\n position: \\\"sticky\\\",\\n        bottom: 0,\\n        borderTop: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n        backgroundColor: \\\"rgba(255,255,255,0.95)\\\",\\n        backdropFilter: fullWidth\\n            multiline\\n            minRows={1}\\n            maxRows={4}\\n            value={input}\\n            placeholder=\\\"Ask about flood risk, AQI, traffic, power...\\\"\\n            onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.value)}\\n            onKeyDown={(event) => {\\n              if (event.key === \\\"Enter\\\" && !event.shiftKey) {\\n \\\"100%\\\", sm: 132 } }}\\n            aria-label={isSending ? \\\"Stop response\\\" : \\\"Send message\\\"}\\n          >\\n            {isSending ? \\\"Stop\\\" : \\\"Send\\\"}\\n          </Button>\\n        </Stack>\\n      </Stack>\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Box, Divider, LinearProgress, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport type { RiskCardPayload } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface RiskCardProps {\\n  riskCard: RiskCardPayload;\\n}\\n\\nconst severityStyles = {\\n  CRITICAL: { bg: \\\"#FFF0F2\\\", text: \\\"#9B1D2A\\\", bar: \\\"#C0213A\\\" },\\n  HIGH: { bg: \\\"#FFF4ED\\\", text: \\\"#7C3005\\\", bar: \\\"#C2520C\\\" },\\n  MODERATE: { bg: \\\"#FFFBEB\\\", text: \\\"#6B4C00\\\", bar: \\\"#B07D0A\\\" },\\n  LOW: { bg: \\\"#F0FDF4\\\", text: \\\"#14532D\\\", bar: \\\"#16863E\\\" },\\n} as const;\\n\\nfunction MetricRow({ label, value, severity, progress }: { label: string; value: string; severity: keyof typeof severityStyles; progress: number }) {\\n  const palette = severityStyles[severity];\\n  return (\\n    <Stack spacing={0.75}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" gap={2}>\\n        <Typography fontFamily='\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace' fontSize={12} letterSpacing=\\\"0.08em\\\">\\n          {label}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" spacing={1} alignItems=\\\"center\\\">\\n          <Typography fontWeight={600}>{value}</Typography>\\n          <Box sx={{ backgroundColor: palette.bg, color: palette.text, px: 1, py: 0.3, borderRadius: 10, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700 }}>\\n            {severity}\\n          </Box>\\n        </Stack>\\n      </Stack>\\n      <LinearProgress\\n        variant=\\\"determinate\\\"\\n        value={Math.max(0, Math.min(100, progress))}\\n        sx={{\\n          height: 8,\\n          borderRadius: 999,\\n          backgroundColor: \\\"#EEF2F7\\\",\\n          \\\"& .MuiLinearProgress-bar\\\": { backgroundColor: palette.bar },\\n        }}\\n      />\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n}\\n\\nexport default function RiskCard({ riskCard }: RiskCardProps) {\\n  return (\\n    <Box sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\", borderRadius: 2, overflow: \\\"hidden\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#FFFFFF\\\", boxShadow: \\\"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\\\" }}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.5, backgroundColor: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\" }}>\\n        <Typography fontFamily='\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace' fontWeight={700}>\\n          {riskCard.neighborhood}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <Typography fontWeight={700}>Risk Score: {riskCard.overall_risk_score.toFixed(1)}</Typography>\\n      </Stack>\\n\\n      <Stack spacing={1.5} sx={{ px: 2, py: 2 }}>\\n        {riskCard.flood_risk ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"FLOOD\\\"\\n            value={`${Math.round((riskCard.flood_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100)}%`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.flood_risk.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={(riskCard.flood_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.power_outage_risk ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"POWER OUTAGE\\\"\\n            value={`${Math.round((riskCard.power_outage_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100)}%`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.power_outage_risk.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={(riskCard.power_outage_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.traffic_delay_index ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"TRAFFIC\\\"\\n            value={`${(riskCard.traffic_delay_index.congestion_score ?? 0).toFixed(1)}`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.traffic_delay_index.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={((riskCard.traffic_delay_index.congestion_score ?? 0) / 10) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.health_advisory ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"AQI\\\"\\n            value={`${riskCard.health_advisory.aqi ?? 0}`}\\n            severity={riskCard.health_advisory.aqi && riskCard.health_advisory.aqi >= 150 ? \\\"HIGH\\\" : riskCard.health_advisory.aqi && riskCard.health_advisory.aqi >= 100 ? \\\"MODERATE\\\" : \\\"LOW\\\"}\\n            progress={Math.min(100, ((riskCard.health_advisory.aqi ?? 0) / 300) * 100)}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n      </Stack>\\n\\n      {riskCard.emergency_readiness ? (\\n        <>\\n          <Divider />\\n          <Box sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.5, backgroundColor: \\\"#F0F6FF\\\" }}>\\n            <Typography fontWeight={600}>{riskCard.emergency_readiness.recommendation}</Typography>\\n            {riskCard.emergency_readiness.actions?.length ? (\\n              <Box component=\\\"ul\\\" sx={{ mb: 0, mt: 1, pl: 2.5 }}>\\n                {riskCard.emergency_readiness.actions.map((action) => (\\n                  <Typography key={action} component=\\\"li\\\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}>\\n                    {action}\\n                  </Typography>\\n                ))}\\n              </Box>\\n            ) : null}\\n          </Box>\\n        </>\\n      ) : null}\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport OpenInFullRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/OpenInFullRounded\\\";\\nimport WarningAmberRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/WarningAmberRounded\\\";\\nimport { Box, Dialog, DialogContent, DialogTitle, IconButton, Skeleton, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport { buildArtifactSrcDoc, sanitizeArtifactHtml } from \\\"@/lib/artifactSandbox\\\";\\nimport type { ArtifactPayload } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface ArtifactRendererProps {\\n  artifact: ArtifactPayload;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function ArtifactRenderer({ artifact }: ArtifactRendererProps) {\\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const sanitized = useMemo(() => sanitizeArtifactHtml(artifact.source), [artifact.source]);\\n  const srcDoc = useMemo(() => buildArtifactSrcDoc(sanitized, artifact.title), [sanitized, artifact.title]);\\n  const hasRenderableContent = sanitized.length > 0;\\n\\n  const frame = hasRenderableContent ? (\\n    <Box\\n      component=\\\"iframe\\\"\\n      title={artifact.title}\\n      srcDoc={srcDoc}\\n      sandbox=\\\"\\\"\\n      sx={{ width: \\\"100%\\\", height: 280, border: 0, display: \\\"block\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#fff\\\" }}\\n    />\\n  ) : (\\n    <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" spacing={1} alignItems=\\\"flex-start\\\" sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #F2C7CE\\\", borderRadius: 2, backgroundColor: \\\"#FFF0F2\\\", p: 2 }}>\\n      <WarningAmberRoundedIcon color=\\\"error\\\" />\\n      <Box>\\n        <Typography fontWeight={700}>Chart could not be rendered</Typography>\\n        <Typography color=\\\"text.secondary\\\">{artifact.description ?? \\\"The artifact did not contain safe renderable HTML.\\\"}</Typography>\\n      </Box>\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Box role=\\\"figure\\\" aria-label={artifact.title} sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\", borderRadius: 2, overflow: \\\"hidden\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#fff\\\" }}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.25, backgroundColor: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\", borderBottom: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\" }}>\\n        <Typography fontSize={13} fontWeight={600}>\\n          {artifact.title}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <IconButton aria-label={`Expand chart: ${artifact.title}`} onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>\\n          <OpenInFullRoundedIcon fontSize=\\\"small\\\" />\\n        </IconButton>\\n      </Stack>\\n      <Box sx={{ p: 2, minHeight: 200 }}>\\n        {artifact.source ? frame : <Skeleton variant=\\\"rounded\\\" height={220} />}\\n      </Box>\\n      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} fullWidth maxWidth=\\\"lg\\\" aria-modal=\\\"true\\\">\\n        <DialogTitle>{artifact.title}</DialogTitle>\\n        <DialogContent>{frame}</DialogContent>\\n      </Dialog>\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Box, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport ArtifactRenderer from \\\"@/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer\\\";\\nimport RiskCard from \\\"@/components/chat/RiskCard\\\";\\nimport type { Message } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface MessageBubbleProps {\\n  message: Message;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function MessageBubble({ message }: MessageBubbleProps) {\\n  const isUser = message.role === \\\"user\\\";\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Stack alignItems={isUser ? \\\"flex-end\\\" : \\\"flex-start\\\"} spacing={0.75}>\\n      <Box\\n        sx={{\\n          maxWidth: { xs: \\\"100%\\\", md: isUser ? \\\"72%\\\" : \\\"80%\\\" },\\n          width: \\\"fit-content\\\",\\n          borderRadius: isUser ? \\\"12px 12px 2px 12px\\\" : \\\"12px 12px 12px 2px\\\",\\n          border: isUser ? \\\"1px solid #C9D6E3\\\" : \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n          borderLeft: isUser ? undefined : \\\"3px solid #005F8E\\\",\\n          backgroundColor: isUser ? \\\"#EEF2F7\\\" : \\\"#FFFFFF\\\",\\n          px: 2,\\n          py: 1.5,\\n        }}\\n      >\\n        <Typography sx={{ whiteSpace: \\\"pre-wrap\\\", color: message.isError ? \\\"error.main\\\" : \\\"text.primary\\\" }}>\\n          {message.content}\\n        </Typography>\\n        {!isUser && message.riskCard ?  backdropFilter: \\\"blur(12px)\\\",\\n        boxShadow: \\\"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\\\",\\n      }}\\n    >\\n      <Stack\\n        direction={{ xs: \\\"column\\\", md: \\\"row\\\" }}\\n        spacing={2}\\n        alignItems={{ xs: \\\"flex-start\\\", md: \\\"center\\\" }}\\n        justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\"\\n        sx={{ px: { xs: 2, md: 4 }, py: 2 }}\\n      >\\n        <Box>\\n          <Typography variant=\\\"h5\\\" fontWeight={700} letterSpacing=\\\"0.08em\\\">\\n            METROSENSE\\n          </Typography>\\n          <Typography\\n            sx={{\\n              color: \\\"text.secondary\\\",\\n              fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace',\\n              fontSize: 11,\\n              letterSpacing: \\\"0.12em\\\",\\n            }}\\n \\\"stretch\\\", sm: \\\"center\\\" }}>\\n          <Stack\\n            direction=\\\"row\\\"\\n            spacing={1}\\n            alignItems=\\\"center\\\"\\n            sx={{\\n              borderLeft: `4px solid ${statusConfig.border}`,\\n              borderRadius: 2,\\n              backgroundColor: statusConfig.bg,\\n              color: statusConfig.color,\\n              px: 1.5,\\n              py: 1,\\n            }}\\n          >\\n            <StatusIcon status={agentStatus} />\\n            <Typography fontWeight={600}>{statusConfig.label}</Typography>\\n          </Stack>\\n\\n          <ButtonBase\\n            aria-label=\\\"Copy session ID\\\"\\n            onClick={() => navigator.clipboard?.writeText(sessionId)}\\n            sx={{\\n >\\n            <Typography\\n              sx={{\\n                color: \\\"text.secondary\\\",\\n                fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace',\\n                fontSize: 11,\\n                letterSpacing: \\\"0.08em\\\",\\n              }}\\n            >\\n              SESSION · {compactSession}\\n            </Typography>\\n          </ButtonBase>\\n        </Stack>\\n aria-live=\\\"polite\\\"\\n      aria-label=\\\"Agent is analyzing sensor data\\\"\\n      sx={{ color: \\\"text.secondary\\\", px: 1, py: 1 }}\\n    >\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" spacing={0.5}>\\n        {[0, 1, 2].map((dot) => (\\n          <Box\\n            key={dot}\\n            sx={{\\n              width: 8,\\n              height: 8,\\n              borderRadius: \\\"50%\\\",\\n              backgroundColor: \\\"primary.main\\\",\\n              animation: \\\"pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite\\\",\\n              animationDelay: `${dot * 0.12}s`,\\n              \\\"@keyframes pulse\\\": {\\n                \\\"0%, 80%, 100%\\\": { opacity: 0.25, transform: \\\"scale(0.8)\\\" },\\n                \\\"40%\\\": { opacity: 1, transform: \\\"scale(1)\\\" },\\n              },\\n              \\\"@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\\\": {\\n                animation: \\\"none\\\",\\n              },\\n            }}\\n          />\\n        ))}\\n onSelect }: SuggestedPromptsProps) {\\n  return (\\n    <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" flexWrap=\\\"wrap\\\" gap={1} aria-label=\\\"Suggested prompts\\\">\\n      {prompts.map((prompt) => (\\n        <Chip\\n          key={prompt}\\n          label={prompt}\\n          onClick={() => onSelect(prompt)}\\n          sx={{\\n            height: \\\"auto\\\",\\n            minHeight: 44,\\n {\\n              whiteSpace: \\\"normal\\\",\\n              paddingBlock: 1,\\n            },\\n          }}\\n        />\\n      ))}\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/input/InputBar.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport SendRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/SendRounded\\\";\\nimport StopRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/StopRounded\\\";\\nimport { Box, Button, Stack, TextField } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport SuggestedPrompts from \\\"@/components/chat/SuggestedPrompts\\\";\\n\\ninterface InputBarProps {\\n  input: string;\\n  isSending: boolean;\\n  prompts: string[];\\n  showPrompts: boolean;\\n  onChange: (value: string) => void;\\n  onSend: () => void;\\n  onSelectPrompt: (prompt: string) => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function InputBar({\\n  input,\\n  isSending,\\n  prompts,\\n  showPrompts,\\n  onChange,\\n  onSend,\\n  onSelectPrompt,\\n}: InputBarProps) {\\n  return (\\n    <Box\\n      sx={{\\n        position: \\\"sticky\\\",\\n        bottom: 0,\\n        borderTop: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n        backgroundColor: \\\"rgba(255,255,255,0.95)\\\",\\n        backdropFilter: \\\"blur(12px)\\\",\\n        px: { xs: 2, md: 4 },\\n        py: 2,\\n      }}\\n    >\\n      <Stack spacing={2}>\\n        {showPrompts ? <SuggestedPrompts prompts={prompts} onSelect={onSelectPrompt} /> : null}\\n        <Stack direction={{ xs: \\\"column\\\", sm: \\\"row\\\" }} spacing={1.5} alignItems={{ sm: \\\"flex-end\\\" }}>\\n          <TextField\\n            fullWidth\\n            multiline\\n            minRows={1}\\n            maxRows={4}\\n            value={input}\\n            placeholder=\\\"Ask about flood risk, AQI, traffic, power...\\\"\\n            onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.value)}\\n            onKeyDown={(event) => {\\n              if (event.key === \\\"Enter\\\" && !event.shiftKey) {\\n                event.preventDefault();\\n                onSend();\\n              }\\n            }}\\n            sx={{\\n              \\\"& .MuiOutlinedInput-root\\\": {\\n                backgroundColor: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\",\\n                alignItems: \\\"flex-start\\\",\\n              },\\n            }}\\n          />\\n          <Button\\n            variant=\\\"contained\\\"\\n            onClick={onSend}\\n            disabled={!input.trim() || isSending}\\n            startIcon={isSending ? <StopRoundedIcon /> : <SendRoundedIcon />}\\n            sx={{ minHeight: 44, minWidth: { xs: \\\"100%\\\", sm: 132 } }}\\n            aria-label={isSending ? \\\"Stop response\\\" : \\\"Send message\\\"}\\n          >\\n            {isSending ? \\\"Stop\\\" : \\\"Send\\\"}\\n          </Button>\\n        </Stack>\\n      </Stack>\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Box, Divider, LinearProgress, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport type { RiskCardPayload } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface RiskCardProps {\\n  riskCard: RiskCardPayload;\\n}\\n\\nconst severityStyles = {\\n  CRITICAL: { bg: \\\"#FFF0F2\\\", text: \\\"#9B1D2A\\\", bar: \\\"#C0213A\\\" },\\n  HIGH: { bg: \\\"#FFF4ED\\\", text: \\\"#7C3005\\\", bar: \\\"#C2520C\\\" },\\n  MODERATE: { bg: \\\"#FFFBEB\\\", text: \\\"#6B4C00\\\", bar: \\\"#B07D0A\\\" },\\n  LOW: { bg: \\\"#F0FDF4\\\", text: \\\"#14532D\\\", bar: \\\"#16863E\\\" },\\n} as const;\\n\\nfunction MetricRow({ label, value, severity, progress }: { label: string; value: string; severity: keyof typeof severityStyles; progress: number }) {\\n  const palette = severityStyles[severity];\\n  return (\\n    <Stack spacing={0.75}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" gap={2}>\\n        <Typography fontFamily='\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace' fontSize={12} letterSpacing=\\\"0.08em\\\">\\n          {label}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" spacing={1} alignItems=\\\"center\\\">\\n          <Typography fontWeight={600}>{value}</Typography>\\n          <Box sx={{ backgroundColor: palette.bg, color: palette.text, px: 1, py: 0.3, borderRadius: 10, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700 }}>\\n            {severity}\\n          </Box>\\n        </Stack>\\n      </Stack>\\n      <LinearProgress\\n        variant=\\\"determinate\\\"\\n        value={Math.max(0, Math.min(100, progress))}\\n        sx={{\\n          height: 8,\\n          borderRadius: 999,\\n          backgroundColor: \\\"#EEF2F7\\\",\\n          \\\"& .MuiLinearProgress-bar\\\": { backgroundColor: palette.bar },\\n        }}\\n      />\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n}\\n\\nexport default function RiskCard({ riskCard }: RiskCardProps) {\\n  return (\\n    <Box sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\", borderRadius: 2, overflow: \\\"hidden\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#FFFFFF\\\", boxShadow: \\\"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\\\" }}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.5, backgroundColor: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\" }}>\\n        <Typography fontFamily='\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace' fontWeight={700}>\\n          {riskCard.neighborhood}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <Typography fontWeight={700}>Risk Score: {riskCard.overall_risk_score.toFixed(1)}</Typography>\\n      </Stack>\\n\\n      <Stack spacing={1.5} sx={{ px: 2, py: 2 }}>\\n        {riskCard.flood_risk ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"FLOOD\\\"\\n            value={`${Math.round((riskCard.flood_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100)}%`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.flood_risk.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={(riskCard.flood_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.power_outage_risk ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"POWER OUTAGE\\\"\\n            value={`${Math.round((riskCard.power_outage_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100)}%`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.power_outage_risk.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={(riskCard.power_outage_risk.probability ?? 0) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.traffic_delay_index ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"TRAFFIC\\\"\\n            value={`${(riskCard.traffic_delay_index.congestion_score ?? 0).toFixed(1)}`}\\n            severity={(riskCard.traffic_delay_index.severity ?? \\\"LOW\\\") as keyof typeof severityStyles}\\n            progress={((riskCard.traffic_delay_index.congestion_score ?? 0) / 10) * 100}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n        {riskCard.health_advisory ? (\\n          <MetricRow\\n            label=\\\"AQI\\\"\\n            value={`${riskCard.health_advisory.aqi ?? 0}`}\\n            severity={riskCard.health_advisory.aqi && riskCard.health_advisory.aqi >= 150 ? \\\"HIGH\\\" : riskCard.health_advisory.aqi && riskCard.health_advisory.aqi >= 100 ? \\\"MODERATE\\\" : \\\"LOW\\\"}\\n            progress={Math.min(100, ((riskCard.health_advisory.aqi ?? 0) / 300) * 100)}\\n          />\\n        ) : null}\\n      </Stack>\\n\\n      {riskCard.emergency_readiness ? (\\n        <>\\n          <Divider />\\n          <Box sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.5, backgroundColor: \\\"#F0F6FF\\\" }}>\\n            <Typography fontWeight={600}>{riskCard.emergency_readiness.recommendation}</Typography>\\n            {riskCard.emergency_readiness.actions?.length ? (\\n              <Box component=\\\"ul\\\" sx={{ mb: 0, mt: 1, pl: 2.5 }}>\\n                {riskCard.emergency_readiness.actions.map((action) => (\\n                  <Typography key={action} component=\\\"li\\\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}>\\n                    {action}\\n                  </Typography>\\n                ))}\\n              </Box>\\n            ) : null}\\n          </Box>\\n        </>\\n      ) : null}\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport OpenInFullRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/OpenInFullRounded\\\";\\nimport WarningAmberRoundedIcon from \\\"@mui/icons-material/WarningAmberRounded\\\";\\nimport { Box, Dialog, DialogContent, DialogTitle, IconButton, Skeleton, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport { buildArtifactSrcDoc, sanitizeArtifactHtml } from \\\"@/lib/artifactSandbox\\\";\\nimport type { ArtifactPayload } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface ArtifactRendererProps {\\n  artifact: ArtifactPayload;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function ArtifactRenderer({ artifact }: ArtifactRendererProps) {\\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const sanitized = useMemo(() => sanitizeArtifactHtml(artifact.source), [artifact.source]);\\n  const srcDoc = useMemo(() => buildArtifactSrcDoc(sanitized, artifact.title), [sanitized, artifact.title]);\\n  const hasRenderableContent = sanitized.length > 0;\\n\\n  const frame = hasRenderableContent ? (\\n    <Box\\n      component=\\\"iframe\\\"\\n      title={artifact.title}\\n      srcDoc={srcDoc}\\n      sandbox=\\\"\\\"\\n      sx={{ width: \\\"100%\\\", height: 280, border: 0, display: \\\"block\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#fff\\\" }}\\n    />\\n  ) : (\\n    <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" spacing={1} alignItems=\\\"flex-start\\\" sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #F2C7CE\\\", borderRadius: 2, backgroundColor: \\\"#FFF0F2\\\", p: 2 }}>\\n      <WarningAmberRoundedIcon color=\\\"error\\\" />\\n      <Box>\\n        <Typography fontWeight={700}>Chart could not be rendered</Typography>\\n        <Typography color=\\\"text.secondary\\\">{artifact.description ?? \\\"The artifact did not contain safe renderable HTML.\\\"}</Typography>\\n      </Box>\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Box role=\\\"figure\\\" aria-label={artifact.title} sx={{ border: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\", borderRadius: 2, overflow: \\\"hidden\\\", backgroundColor: \\\"#fff\\\" }}>\\n      <Stack direction=\\\"row\\\" alignItems=\\\"center\\\" justifyContent=\\\"space-between\\\" sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.25, backgroundColor: \\\"#F7F9FC\\\", borderBottom: \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\" }}>\\n        <Typography fontSize={13} fontWeight={600}>\\n          {artifact.title}\\n        </Typography>\\n        <IconButton aria-label={`Expand chart: ${artifact.title}`} onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>\\n          <OpenInFullRoundedIcon fontSize=\\\"small\\\" />\\n        </IconButton>\\n      </Stack>\\n      <Box sx={{ p: 2, minHeight: 200 }}>\\n        {artifact.source ? frame : <Skeleton variant=\\\"rounded\\\" height={220} />}\\n      </Box>\\n      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} fullWidth maxWidth=\\\"lg\\\" aria-modal=\\\"true\\\">\\n        <DialogTitle>{artifact.title}</DialogTitle>\\n        <DialogContent>{frame}</DialogContent>\\n      </Dialog>\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Box, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport ArtifactRenderer from \\\"@/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer\\\";\\nimport RiskCard from \\\"@/components/chat/RiskCard\\\";\\nimport type { Message } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface MessageBubbleProps {\\n  message: Message;\\n}\\n\\nexport default function MessageBubble({ message }: MessageBubbleProps) {\\n  const isUser = message.role === \\\"user\\\";\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Stack alignItems={isUser ? \\\"flex-end\\\" : \\\"flex-start\\\"} spacing={0.75}>\\n      <Box\\n        sx={{\\n          maxWidth: { xs: \\\"100%\\\", md: isUser ? \\\"72%\\\" : \\\"80%\\\" },\\n          width: \\\"fit-content\\\",\\n          borderRadius: isUser ? \\\"12px 12px 2px 12px\\\" : \\\"12px 12px 12px 2px\\\",\\n          border: isUser ? \\\"1px solid #C9D6E3\\\" : \\\"1px solid #D1DBE8\\\",\\n          borderLeft: isUser ? undefined : \\\"3px solid #005F8E\\\",\\n          backgroundColor: isUser ? \\\"#EEF2F7\\\" : \\\"#FFFFFF\\\",\\n          px: 2,\\n          py: 1.5,\\n        }}\\n      >\\n        <Typography sx={{ whiteSpace: \\\"pre-wrap\\\", color: message.isError ? \\\"error.main\\\" : \\\"text.primary\\\" }}>\\n          {message.content}\\n        </Typography>\\n        {!isUser && message.riskCard ? (\\n          <Box sx={{ mt: 1.5 }}>\\n            <RiskCard riskCard={message.riskCard} />\\n          </Box>\\n        ) : null}\\n        {!isUser && message.artifact ? (\\n          <Box sx={{ mt: 1.5 }}>\\n            <ArtifactRenderer artifact={message.artifact} />\\n          </Box>\\n        ) : null}\\n      </Box>\\n      <Typography sx={{ color: \\\"text.secondary\\\", fontFamily: '\\\"IBM Plex Mono\\\", monospace', fontSize: 11 }}>\\n        {message.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \\\"2-digit\\\", minute: \\\"2-digit\\\" })}\\n      </Typography>\\n    </Stack>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/components/chat/MessageList.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport { Box, Stack, Typography } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport MessageBubble from \\\"@/components/chat/MessageBubble\\\";\\nimport ThinkingIndicator from \\\"@/components/chat/ThinkingIndicator\\\";\\nimport type { Message } from \\\"@/types/chat\\\";\\n\\ninterface MessageListProps {\\n  isSending: boolean;\\n  messages: Message[];\\n}\\n\\nexport default function MessageList({ isSending, messages }: MessageListProps) {\\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\\n  const [stickToBottom, setStickToBottom] = useState(true);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const node = containerRef.current;\\n    if (!node || !stickToBottom) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    node.scrollTo({ top: node.scrollHeight, behavior: \\\"smooth\\\" });\\n  }, [messages, isSending, stickToBottom]);\\n\\n  const emptyState = useMemo(\\n    () => (\\n      <Box sx={{ textAlign: \\\"center\\\", py: 8, color: \\\"text.secondary\\\" }}>\\n        <Typography variant=\\\"h5\\\" fontWeight={700} color=\\\"text.primary\\\" gutterBottom>\\n          Bengaluru climate intelligence, one question at a time.\\n        </Typography>\\n        <Typography>\\n          Ask about flood risk, air quality, traffic disruption, or infrastructure readiness.\\n        </Typography>\\n      </Box>\\n    ),\\n    [],\\n  );\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Box\\n      ref={containerRef}\\n      role=\\\"log\\\"\\n      aria-live=\\\"polite\\\"\\n      aria-label=\\\"Conversation\\\"\\n      onScroll={(event) => {\\n        const node = event.currentTarget;\\n        const nearBottom = node.scrollHeight - node.scrollTop - node.clientHeight < 48;\\n        setStickToBottom(nearBottom);\\n      }}\\n      sx={{ flex: 1, overflowY: \\\"auto\\\", px: { xs: 2, md: 4 }, py: 3 }}\\n    >\\n      {messages.length === 0 ? emptyState : <Stack spacing={2}>{messages.map((message) => <MessageBubble key={message.id} message={message} />)}</Stack>}\\n      {isSending ? <ThinkingIndicator /> : null}\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Box } from \\\"@mui/material\\\";\\nimport MessageList from \\\"@/components/chat/MessageList\\\";\\nimport InputBar from \\\"@/components/input/InputBar\\\";\\nimport Header from \\\"@/components/layout/Header\\\";\\nimport { useChat } from \\\"@/hooks/useChat\\\";\\n\\nexport default function ChatPage() {\\n  const { agentStatus, input, isSending, messages, prompts, sessionId, setInput, sendMessage } = useChat();\\n\\n  return (\\n    <Box sx={{ minHeight: \\\"100vh\\\", display: \\\"flex\\\", flexDirection: \\\"column\\\" }}>\\n      <Header agentStatus={agentStatus} sessionId={sessionId} />\\n      <MessageList isSending={isSending} messages={messages} />\\n      <InputBar\\n        input={input}\\n        isSending={isSending}\\n        prompts={prompts}\\n        showPrompts={messages.length === 0}\\n        onChange={setInput}\\n        onSend={() => void sendMessage()}\\n        onSelectPrompt={(prompt) => {\\n          setInput(prompt);\\n          void sendMessage(prompt);\\n        }}\\n      />\\n    </Box>\\n  );\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/App.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { Navigate, Route, Routes } from \\\"react-router-dom\\\";\\nimport ChatPage from \\\"@/pages/ChatPage\\\";\\n\\nfunction );\\n}\\n\\nexport default App;\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/main.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport \\\"@fontsource/ibm-plex-mono/400.css\\\";\\nimport \\\"@fontsource/ibm-plex-sans/400.css\\\";\\nimport src=\\\"https://example.com/a.png\\\" /><a href=\\\"https://example.com\\\">link</a><svg><rect width=\\\"10\\\" height=\\\"10\\\"/></svg></div>',\\n    );\\n\\n    expect(html).not.toContain(\\\"script\\\");\\n    expect(html).not.toContain(\\\"onclick\\\");\\n    expect(html).not.toContain(\\\"https://example.com\\\");\\n    expect(html).toContain(\\\"svg\\\");\\n  });\\n});\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/src/hooks/useChat.test.tsx <<'EOF'\\nimport { act, renderHook, waitFor } from \\\"@testing-library/react\\\";\\nimport { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from \\\"vitest\\\";\\nimport { getHealth, postChat } from \\\"@/lib/api\\\";\\nimport { useChat } from \\\"@/hooks/useChat\\\";\\n\\nvi.mock(\\\"@/lib/api\\\", () => ({\\n  getHealth: vi.fn(),\\n  postChat: vi.fn(),\\n}));\\n\\ndescribe(\\\"useChat\\\", () => {\\n  beforeEach(() => {\\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockResolvedValue({ backend: \\\"ok\\\", agent: \\\"ok\\\", status: \\\"online\\\" });\\n  });\\n\\n  it(\\\"appends user and assistant messages on success\\\", async () => {\\n    vi.mocked(postChat).mockResolvedValue({\\n      message: \\\"Agent reply\\\",\\n      risk_card: null,\\n      artifact: null,\\n    });\\n\\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\\n\\n    await act(async () => {\\n      result.current.setInput(\\\"Hello\\\");\\n      await result.current.sendMessage();\\n    });\\n\\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.messages).toHaveLength(2));\\n    expect(result.current.messages[0]?.content).toBe(\\\"Hello\\\");\\n    expect(result.current.messages[1]?.content).toBe(\\\"Agent reply\\\");\\n    expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\\\"online\\\");\\n  });\\n\\n  it(\\\"falls back to degraded status when health polling fails\\\", async () => {\\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error(\\\"down\\\"));\\n\\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\\n\\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\\\"degraded\\\"));\\n  });\\n});\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > client/vitest.config.ts <<'EOF'\\nimport { defineConfig } from \\\"vitest/config\\\";\\nimport react from ## Entry 473
```
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:30:55.228Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:30:55.228Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_RfFuhWz2CzSdjn9X4iZ1SVXI",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 744f6c\nWall time: 0.0000 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 344\nOutput:\nimport { act, renderHook, waitFor } from \"@testing-library/react\";\nimport { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from \"vitest\";\nimport { getHealth, postChat } from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport { useChat } from \"@/hooks/useChat\";\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/api\", () => ({\n  getHealth: vi.fn(),\n  postChat: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\ndescribe(\"useChat\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockResolvedValue({ backend: \"ok\", agent: \"ok\", status: \"online\" });\n  });\n\n  it(\"appends user and assistant messages on success\", async () => {\n    vi.mocked(postChat).mockResolvedValue({\n      message: \"Agent reply\",\n      risk_card: null,\n      artifact: null,\n    });\n\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\n\n    await act(async () => {\n      result.current.setInput(\"Hello\");\n      await result.current.sendMessage();\n    });\n\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.messages).toHaveLength(2));\n    expect(result.current.messages[0]?.content).toBe(\"Hello\");\n    expect(result.current.messages[1]?.content).toBe(\"Agent reply\");\n    expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\"online\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"falls back to degraded status when health polling fails\", async () => {\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error(\"down\"));\n\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\n\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\"degraded\"));\n  });\n});\n"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_RfFuhWz2CzSdjn9X4iZ1SVXI",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 744f6c\nWall time: 0.0000 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 344\nOutput:\nimport { act, renderHook, waitFor } from \"@testing-library/react\";\nimport { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from \"vitest\";\nimport { getHealth, postChat } from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport { useChat } from \"@/hooks/useChat\";\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/api\", () => ({\n  getHealth: vi.fn(),\n  postChat: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\ndescribe(\"useChat\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockResolvedValue({ backend: \"ok\", agent: \"ok\", status: \"online\" });\n  });\n\n  it(\"appends user and assistant messages on success\", async () => {\n    vi.mocked(postChat).mockResolvedValue({\n      message: \"Agent reply\",\n      risk_card: null,\n      artifact: null,\n    });\n\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\n\n    await act(async () => {\n      result.current.setInput(\"Hello\");\n      await result.current.sendMessage();\n    });\n\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.messages).toHaveLength(2));\n    expect(result.current.messages[0]?.content).toBe(\"Hello\");\n    expect(result.current.messages[1]?.content).toBe(\"Agent reply\");\n    expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\"online\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"falls back to degraded status when health polling fails\", async () => {\n    vi.mocked(getHealth).mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error(\"down\"));\n\n    const { result } = renderHook(() => useChat());\n\n    await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.agentStatus).toBe(\"degraded\"));\n  });\n});\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 572
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:35:21.060Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:35:21.060Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "Implemented the MetroSense v1 frontend/backend slice described by the updated spec.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Added the new frontend chat app shell, MetroSense theme, header/status pill, message list, suggested prompts, risk card, artifact renderer, and input bar.\n- Implemented plain JSON chat flow in `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts` with composite health polling.\n- Added HTML artifact sanitization + sandboxed iframe rendering in `client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts`.\n- Added frontend tests with Vitest + RTL.\n- Added backend `/api/chat`, `/api/health`, and agent proxy support.\n- Added backend tests for chat responses and degraded health.\n- Updated client/server dependency manifests and lockfiles.\n\nKey files:\n- `client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx`\n- `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts`\n- `client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx`\n- `client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx`\n- `client/src/theme/metrosense.ts`\n- `client/vitest.config.ts`\n- `server/app/api/routes/chat.py`\n- `server/app/services/agent_proxy.py`\n\nValidation run:\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_chat_api.py tests/unit/test_health.py -q`\n- `client`: `npm test`\n- `client`: `npm run lint`\n- `client`: `npm run build`\n\nAll of those passed.\n\nOne important note:\n- The UI and backend contract are in place, but there is still no actual `agents/` service implemented in the repo yet, so live chat depends on that service being added or mocked. The backend currently expects `AGENT_SERVER_URL` to point to it.\n\nNatural next steps:\n1. Implement the `agents/` service with `/chat` and `/health`.\n2. Add backend integration tests against a mocked or local agent service.\n3. Hook Docker Compose up to the new `agents/` service.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**

```json
{

    "message": "Implemented the MetroSense v1 frontend/backend slice described by the updated spec.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Added the new frontend chat app shell, MetroSense theme, header/status pill, message list, suggested prompts, risk card, artifact renderer, and input bar.\n- Implemented plain JSON chat flow in `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts` with composite health polling.\n- Added HTML artifact sanitization + sandboxed iframe rendering in `client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts`.\n- Added frontend tests with Vitest + RTL.\n- Added backend `/api/chat`, `/api/health`, and agent proxy support.\n- Added backend tests for chat responses and degraded health.\n- Updated client/server dependency manifests and lockfiles.\n\nKey files:\n- `client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx`\n- `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts`\n- `client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx`\n- `client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx`\n- `client/src/theme/metrosense.ts`\n- `client/vitest.config.ts`\n- `server/app/api/routes/chat.py`\n- `server/app/services/agent_proxy.py`\n\nValidation run:\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_chat_api.py tests/unit/test_health.py -q`\n- `client`: `npm test`\n- `client`: `npm run lint`\n- `client`: `npm run build`\n\nAll of those passed.\n\nOne important note:\n- The UI and backend contract are in place, but there is still no actual `agents/` service implemented in the repo yet, so live chat depends on that service being added or mocked. The backend currently expects `AGENT_SERVER_URL` to point to it.\n\nNatural next steps:\n1. Implement the `agents/` service with `/chat` and `/health`.\n2. Add backend integration tests against a mocked or local agent service.\n3. Hook Docker Compose up to the new `agents/` service.",
```

```json
{

  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "message",
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": [
      {
        "type": "output_text",
        "text": "Implemented the MetroSense v1 frontend/backend slice described by the updated spec.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Added the new frontend chat app shell, MetroSense theme, header/status pill, message list, suggested prompts, risk card, artifact renderer, and input bar.\n- Implemented plain JSON chat flow in `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts` with composite health polling.\n- Added HTML artifact sanitization + sandboxed iframe rendering in `client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts`.\n- Added frontend tests with Vitest + RTL.\n- Added backend `/api/chat`, `/api/health`, and agent proxy support.\n- Added backend tests for chat responses and degraded health.\n- Updated client/server dependency manifests and lockfiles.\n\nKey files:\n- `client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx`\n- `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts`\n- `client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx`\n- `client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx`\n- `client/src/theme/metrosense.ts`\n- `client/vitest.config.ts`\n- `server/app/api/routes/chat.py`\n- `server/app/services/agent_proxy.py`\n\nValidation run:\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_chat_api.py tests/unit/test_health.py -q`\n- `client`: `npm test`\n- `client`: `npm run lint`\n- `client`: `npm run build`\n\nAll of those passed.\n\nOne important note:\n- The UI and backend contract are in place, but there is still no actual `agents/` service implemented in the repo yet, so live chat depends on that service being added or mocked. The backend currently expects `AGENT_SERVER_URL` to point to it.\n\nNatural next steps:\n1. Implement the `agents/` service with `/chat` and `/health`.\n2. Add backend integration tests against a mocked or local agent service.\n3. Hook Docker Compose up to the new `agents/` service."
      }
    ],
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

## Entry 575
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:35:21.097Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:35:21.097Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "task_complete",
    "turn_id": "019cd73f-ddb7-72d0-a363-7853ad35a62d",
    "last_agent_message": "Implemented the MetroSense v1 frontend/backend slice described by the updated spec.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Added the new frontend chat app shell, MetroSense theme, header/status pill, message list, suggested prompts, risk card, artifact renderer, and input bar.\n- Implemented plain JSON chat flow in `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts` with composite health polling.\n- Added HTML artifact sanitization + sandboxed iframe rendering in `client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts`.\n- Added frontend tests with Vitest + RTL.\n- Added backend `/api/chat`, `/api/health`, and agent proxy support.\n- Added backend tests for chat responses and degraded health.\n- Updated client/server dependency manifests and lockfiles.\n\nKey files:\n- `client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx`\n- `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts`\n- `client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx`\n- `client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx`\n- `client/src/theme/metrosense.ts`\n- `client/vitest.config.ts`\n- `server/app/api/routes/chat.py`\n- `server/app/services/agent_proxy.py`\n\nValidation run:\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_chat_api.py tests/unit/test_health.py -q`\n- `client`: `npm test`\n- `client`: `npm run lint`\n- `client`: `npm run build`\n\nAll of those passed.\n\nOne important note:\n- The UI and backend contract are in place, but there is still no actual `agents/` service implemented in the repo yet, so live chat depends on that service being added or mocked. The backend currently expects `AGENT_SERVER_URL` to point to it.\n\nNatural next steps:\n1. Implement the `agents/` service with `/chat` and `/health`.\n2. Add backend integration tests against a mocked or local agent service.\n3. Hook Docker Compose up to the new `agents/` service."
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
    "type": "task_complete",
    "turn_id": "019cd73f-ddb7-72d0-a363-7853ad35a62d",
    "last_agent_message": "Implemented the MetroSense v1 frontend/backend slice described by the updated spec.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Added the new frontend chat app shell, MetroSense theme, header/status pill, message list, suggested prompts, risk card, artifact renderer, and input bar.\n- Implemented plain JSON chat flow in `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts` with composite health polling.\n- Added HTML artifact sanitization + sandboxed iframe rendering in `client/src/lib/artifactSandbox.ts`.\n- Added frontend tests with Vitest + RTL.\n- Added backend `/api/chat`, `/api/health`, and agent proxy support.\n- Added backend tests for chat responses and degraded health.\n- Updated client/server dependency manifests and lockfiles.\n\nKey files:\n- `client/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx`\n- `client/src/hooks/useChat.ts`\n- `client/src/components/chat/ArtifactRenderer.tsx`\n- `client/src/components/chat/RiskCard.tsx`\n- `client/src/theme/metrosense.ts`\n- `client/vitest.config.ts`\n- `server/app/api/routes/chat.py`\n- `server/app/services/agent_proxy.py`\n\nValidation run:\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n- `server`: `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_chat_api.py tests/unit/test_health.py -q`\n- `client`: `npm test`\n- `client`: `npm run lint`\n- `client`: `npm run build`\n\nAll of those passed.\n\nOne important note:\n- The UI and backend contract are in place, but there is still no actual `agents/` service implemented in the repo yet, so live chat depends on that service being added or mocked. The backend currently expects `AGENT_SERVER_URL` to point to it.\n\nNatural next steps:\n1. Implement the `agents/` service with `/chat` and `/health`.\n2. Add backend integration tests against a mocked or local agent service.\n3. Hook Docker Compose up to the new `agents/` service."
  }
}
```

```json
        "model": "gpt-5.4",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "realtime_active": false,
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
    "truncation_policy": {
      "mode": "tokens",
      "limit": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

## Entry 582
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:37:11.838Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:37:11.838Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "message",
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": [
      {
        "type": "output_text",
        "text": "I’m switching the frontend tooling/docs from `npm` to `pnpm`, updating lockfiles and commands so the client setup is consistent."
      }
    ],
    "phase": "commentary"
```

## Entry 610
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:37:55.160Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:37:55.160Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_z6FEvOvDfZkzoNEy2PpKyzBx",
    "output": "Chunk ID: bda41c\nWall time: 0.0000 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 933\nOutput:\n# App Scaffold\n\nFull-stack scaffold with FastAPI + React + PostgreSQL. All tooling, quality gates, Docker, and CI/CD pre-configured — zero business logic, ready to build on.\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n| Layer | Technology |\n|-------|-----------|\n| Backend | FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0 (async), Alembic, PostgreSQL 16 |\n| Frontend | React 18, TypeScript, Vite 5, Material-UI v6 |\n| Package Managers | uv (Python), npm (Node) |\n| Quality | Ruff, MyPy (strict), import-linter, ESLint, TypeScript strict |\n| Containers | Docker, Docker Compose |\n| CI | GitHub Actions |\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\n.\n├── .github/workflows/ci.yml    # CI pipeline\n├── docker-compose.yml           # PostgreSQL + API + Client\n├── Dockerfile                   # Multi-stage production build\n├── server/                      # FastAPI backend\n│   ├── app/\n│   │   ├── api/routes/          # HTTP endpoints\n│   │   ├── core/                # Config + logging\n│   │   ├── db/                  # SQLAlchemy models + session\n│   │   ├── middleware/          # Error handler + request logging\n│   │   ├── services/            # Business logic layer\n│   │   └── main.py              # App factory\n│   ├── alembic/                 # Database migrations\n│   ├── tests/                   # Unit + integration tests\n│   └── pyproject.toml           # Dependencies + tool config\n└── client/                      # React frontend\n    ├── src/\n    │   ├── App.tsx              # Router + pages\n    │   ├── main.tsx             # Entry point + providers\n    │   └── lib/api.ts           # Axios instance\n    ├── package.json             # Dependencies + scripts\n    └── Dockerfile               # Node build → Nginx\n```\n\n## Module Boundaries\n\n- `app.api` depends on `app.services`, `app.core` only\n- `app.services` depends on `app.db`, `app.core` only (must NOT import from `app.api`)\n- `app.db` depends on `app.core` only (must NOT import from `app.services` or `app.api`)\n- Enforced by `import-linter` in CI\n\n## Quick Start\n\n```bash\n# Start PostgreSQL\ndocker-compose up -d db\n\n# Backend\ncd server\nuv sync --all-extras\nuv run alembic upgrade head\nuv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8010\n\n# Frontend (separate terminal)\ncd client\nnpm install\nnpm run dev\n```\n\nApp runs at http://localhost:5173 with API proxied to :8010.\n\n## Quality Gates\n\nBackend (from `server/`):\n```bash\nuv run ruff format --check .    # Formatting\nuv run ruff check .             # Linting\nuv run mypy .                   # Type checking (strict)\nuv run lint-imports             # Module boundaries\nuv run pytest tests/unit -q     # Unit tests\nuv run pytest tests/integration -q  # Integration tests\n```\n\nFrontend (from `client/`):\n```bash\nnpm run lint    # ESLint\nnpm run build   # TypeScript + Vite build\n```\n\n## API Endpoints\n\n| Method | Path | Auth | Description |\n|--------|------|------|-------------|\n| GET | `/health` | No | Health check |\n\n## Environment Variables\n\n| Variable | Default | Description |\n|----------|---------|-------------|\n| `ENV` | `development` | development / test / production |\n| `DATABASE_URL` | `postgresql+asyncpg://db_user:db_password@localhost:5433/app_scaffold` | Database connection |\n\n## Docker\n\n```bash\n# Development (3 services)\ndocker-compose up\n\n# Production (single image)\ndocker build -t app-scaffold .\n```\n\n## Coding Style\n\n- Python: 4-space indent, type hints, `snake_case` functions, `PascalCase` classes\n- TypeScript: strict mode, `PascalCase` components, `camelCase` utilities\n- Backend layering: Routes → Services → DB (enforced)\n- Conventional Commits: `feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`\n"
  }
}
```

Formatting\nuv run ruff check .             # Linting\nuv run mypy .                   # Type checking (strict)\nuv run lint-imports             # Module boundaries\nuv run pytest tests/unit -q     # Unit tests\nuv run pytest tests/integration -q  # Integration tests\n```\n\nFrontend (from `client/`):\n```bash\nnpm run lint    # ESLint\nnpm run build   # TypeScript + Vite build\n```\n\n## API Endpoints\n\n| Method | Path | Auth | Description |\n|--------|------|------|-------------|\n| GET | `/health` | No | Health check |\n\n## Environment Variables\n\n| Variable | Default | Description |\n|----------|---------|-------------|\n| `ENV` | `development` | development / test / production |\n| `DATABASE_URL` | `postgresql+asyncpg://db_user:db_password@localhost:5433/app_scaffold` | Database connection |\n\n## Docker\n\n```bash\n# Development (3 services)\ndocker-compose up\n\n# Production (single image)\ndocker build -t app-scaffold .\n```\n\n## Coding Style\n\n- Python: 4-space indent, type hints, `snake_case` functions, `PascalCase` classes\n- TypeScript: strict mode, `PascalCase` components, `camelCase` utilities\n- Backend layering: Routes → Services → DB (enforced)\n- Conventional Commits: `feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`\n"
```json
  }
}
```

## Entry 611
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-10T10:37:55.204Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-10T10:37:55.204Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_Qa5F72pdzU0pM33hG7cZHU9h",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 257823\nWall time: 0.0000 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1918\nOutput:\n# AGENTS.md\n\n## Project Identity\n- This repository currently contains a working full-stack scaffold: `client/` for React, `server/` for FastAPI, PostgreSQL via Docker Compose, and CI/quality gates.\n- The intended product is `MetroSense`, a chat-based climate and infrastructure intelligence system for Bengaluru.\n- The target architecture is a three-service system:\n  - `client/`: frontend chat application\n  - `server/`: public backend API and orchestration layer\n  - `agents/`: internal agent server and tool-execution layer\n- Treat the current scaffold as the implementation baseline and evolve it toward this three-service design instead of creating parallel app structures.\n\n## Canonical Architecture\n- The intended request flow is:\n  - `frontend -> backend -> agent`\n- The frontend should never call the agent service directly.\n- `server/` is the only public API boundary for browser clients.\n- `agents/` is an internal service boundary responsible for agent runtime behavior, tool usage, and structured chat output generation.\n- If existing docs still use `agent/` singular, treat that as referring to the planned `agents/` subsystem until naming is aligned across the repo.\n\n## Why This Boundary Exists\n- Keep secrets, database access, internal tools, and agent infrastructure off the public internet.\n- Let the backend own request validation, session coordination, auth, rate limiting, logging, and response shaping.\n- Preserve a stable frontend contract even if the agent framework, prompting strategy, or toolchain changes.\n- Keep observability and failure handling centralized in the backend rather than split between browser and agent server.\n\n## Tech Stack\n- Backend: Python 3.12, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async, Alembic, PostgreSQL 16, Loguru, `uv`\n- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite 5, MUI v6, React Query, Zustand, Axios, `npm`\n- Tooling: Ruff, MyPy strict, import-linter, ESLint, Docker, Docker Compose, GitHub Actions\n\n## Repository Shape\n- `client/`\n  - Chat UI, streaming presentation, structured response rendering, browser-facing state management.\n- `server/`\n  - Public HTTP API, request validation, orchestration, session handling, backend-to-agent coordination.\n- `agents/`\n  - Planned internal agent service for chat generation, tool calls, retrieval, and domain intelligence.\n- `server/app/api/`\n  - FastAPI routes and request/response boundaries.\n- `server/app/services/`\n  - Backend business logic and internal orchestration code.\n- `server/app/db/`\n  - Database models, metadata, and session management.\n- `server/tests/unit/`\n  - Fast isolated tests for backend logic and simple route behavior.\n- `server/tests/integration/`\n  - App-level and database-backed tests.\n- `docs/FRONTEND_SPEC.md`\n  - Source of truth for the planned MetroSense chat UX and structured response behavior.\n\n## Architectural Rules\n- Preserve backend layering:\n  - `app.api` may depend on `app.services` and `app.core`\n  - `app.services` may depend on `app.db` and `app.core`\n  - `app.db` must not depend on `app.services` or `app.api`\n- Keep the frontend focused on rendering and interaction, not business orchestration.\n- Route all browser chat traffic through `server/`, even after `agents/` exists.\n- Treat backend-to-agent communication as an internal interface that may evolve without breaking the UI.\n- Prefer extending existing `server/` and `client/` entrypoints over introducing duplicate service layers or alternative public APIs.\n\n## Product Direction\n- MetroSense is intended to be a chat-first application for weather risk, flooding, AQI, outage, traffic, and infrastructure-readiness questions.\n- Expected response modes:\n  - streamed assistant text for most responses\n  - agent-emitted `RiskCard` payloads for structured neighborhood risk outputs\n  - agent-emitted `Artifact` payloads for charts, maps, tables, or other visual responses\n- Structured outputs should be decided by the agent layer and delivered through the backend to the frontend.\n- The frontend must render structured responses based on explicit backend/agent event types, not keyword inference.\n\n## Testing And Validation\n- Backend checks from `server/`:\n  - `uv sync --all-extras`\n  - `uv run ruff format --check .`\n  - `uv run ruff check .`\n  - `uv run mypy .`\n  - `uv run lint-imports`\n  - `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`\n  - `uv run pytest tests/integration -q`\n- Frontend checks from `client/`:\n  - `npm ci`\n  - `npm run lint`\n  - `npm run build`\n- Local startup today:\n  - `docker-compose up -d db`\n  - `cd server && uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8010`\n  - `cd client && npm install && npm run dev`\n- When `agents/` is added, update this file with its startup and validation commands in the same change that introduces the service.\n\n## Current Coverage And Next-Step Expectations\n- Current backend tests cover health behavior and auth/password scaffolding.\n- Current integration tests cover health and auth flow scaffolding.\n- As chat features are added, extend coverage for:\n  - backend chat contracts\n  - backend-to-agent coordination\n  - agent response parsing/transport\n  - frontend rendering of streamed text, `RiskCard`, and `Artifact` payloads\n\n## Agent Guidance\n- Before major implementation work, verify repo truth from `README.md`, `server/pyproject.toml`, `client/package.json`, and `docs/FRONTEND_SPEC.md`.\n- Prefer `rg` for search.\n- Do not document or reference unimplemented services as if they already exist.\n- It is acceptable to document `agents/` as planned architecture, but label it clearly as planned until the folder, runtime, and wiring are added.\n- If current scaffold behavior and MetroSense direction diverge, align new work to the MetroSense direction while keeping transitions explicit and incremental.\n\n---\nname: CI\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  pull_request:\n    branches: [main]\n\njobs:\n  backend:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    defaults:\n      run:\n        working-directory: server\n\n    services:\n      postgres:\n        image: postgres:16-alpine\n        env:\n          POSTGRES_DB: app_scaffold_test\n          POSTGRES_USER: postgres\n          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres\n        ports:\n          - 5432:5432\n        options: >-\n          --health-cmd pg_isready\n          --health-interval 10s\n          --health-timeout 5s\n          --health-retries 5\n\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Set up Python 3.12\n        uses: actions/setup-python@v5\n        with:\n          python-version: \"3.12\"\n\n      - name: Install uv\n        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3\n\n      - name: Install dependencies\n        run: uv sync --all-extras\n\n      - name: Ruff format check\n        run: uv run ruff format --check .\n\n      - name: Ruff lint\n        run: uv run ruff check .\n\n      - name: Mypy\n        run: uv run mypy .\n\n      - name: Import linter\n        run: uv run lint-imports\n\n      - name: Unit tests\n        run: uv run pytest tests/unit -q\n\n      - name: Integration tests\n        run: uv run pytest tests/integration -q\n        env:\n          DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://db_user:db_password@localhost:5432/app_scaffold_test\n          SECRET_KEY: test-secret\n          ENV: test\n\n  frontend:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    defaults:\n      run:\n        working-directory: client\n\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Set up Node 20\n        uses: actions/setup-node@v4\n        with:\n          node-version: \"20\"\n          cache: \"npm\"\n          cache-dependency-path: client/package-lock.json\n\n      - name: Install dependencies\n        run: npm ci\n\n      - name: ESLint\n        run: npm run lint\n\n      - name: Build\n        run: npm run build\n"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
